description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to the dev branch, on pull requests to dev, and on pull request targets to dev. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest with different configurations for clang and gcc, and installs Python 3.7. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs system and Python dependencies, runs a Python linter, checks include guards, configures and builds the project, runs tests, and shows failure logs if the job fails.
